title: Mixed Up Items
description: This resource pack will mix all item textures.
body:
This resource pack **will mix all item** textures. The main thing is _not to get confused_.

![inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d9e4d2e280c16b12214dbd7cf9e1a48c43802355.png)
![inventory2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff1eaeba755af8dc90d256f54c332c132d0d8e69.png)
